content:
My wife said "you're wasting time on that laptop"

I showed her the Polymarket balance the next morning

She hasn't said that since

$300 → $2,488 in one night

3 sub-agents running on a Mac Mini in my closet:

Agent-01: 
Scans 62 active markets every 10 minutes

Agent-02: 
Builds fair value from NOAA data, on-chain metrics, sentiment

Agent-03:
Executes - signs with EIP-712, posts to CLOB on Polygon

The edge was stupid simple
Weather markets on Polymarket update every few hours

NOAA updates every 6 hours

That's a window where the crowd doesn't know what meteorologists already do

NOAA confidence drops to 63% on Texas rain

Polymarket still showing 72%

Agent-01 flags 14% mispricing

Agent-03 buys YES at 18¢

67.5% win rate
$22.10 avg per trade
2.8% max drawdown

Try copytrade it: http://t.me/KreoPolyBot?start=ref-rarilr

Then Agent-02 sent me this at 3am:

"weather alpha saturating. requesting $100/mo Twitter API budget for political markets"

I didn't program that

It decided on its own that one edge wasn't enough

It's planning its own growth strategy
